quests.name: The Sun's Hunger
quests.description: Nahuatlan's toltecs feed a sun-god with blood. Break the rite.
dialogueStart: The toltecs bleed captives to a starving sun. Every drop makes the temple south of here stronger.
Cut down their warriors and topple the idol that drinks the blood.
dialogueCompletion: The idol lies shattered. The sun-god goes hungry tonight.
Their champion, the Scarabeus, still guards the pyramid. Its shell wards against the desert's curse — I need it.

quests.name: The Scarab's Shell
quests.description: Slay the Kenphrox Scarabeus and claim its shell.
dialogueStart: Two shells will armour us against the tomb's curse. The Scarabeus will not give them freely.
Beware its sweep — it clears the ground around it. Strike from range when it winds up.
dialogueCompletion: The shells hold the curse at bay. We are almost ready for the desert.
One rite remains — the toltecs will spend everything to stop us at their blood pyramid.

quests.name: The Blood Pyramid
quests.description: Hold the blood pyramid against the toltecs' last stand.

objectives.description: Repel 5 waves at the Blood Pyramid

dialogueStart: The pyramid is the last thread feeding the desert temple. Sever it.
Five waves — everything they have. Hold, and the road to the Great Desert opens.
dialogueCompletion: Nahuatlan falls silent. The sun-god starves at last.
Only the desert remains — and beneath it, the tomb where all of this began.
